what: Structured audit log of Aegis demo runs — model load/unload + per-inference performance (TTFT, tokens, tokens/sec, backend), captured from @qvac/sdk request-lifecycle events + CompletionStats. Built by shared/src/metrics/logger.ts (EvidenceRow schema).

runs.device: iPhone 15 Pro Max — Apple A17 Pro GPU (Metal)
runs.source: read off the physical device; see evidence/on-device-inference.md

runs.device: MacBook Pro (Mac16,1) — Apple M4, 16 GB (CPU backend)
runs.source: provider smoke run; raw @qvac/sdk request-lifecycle in evidence/audit-log.txt

notes: All inference via @qvac/sdk, on-device. The phone run is the headline edge metric (GPU, 0 network calls). The laptop run shows the same load→infer→unload lifecycle with full timing. Delegated (phone↔laptop) runs reuse the identical lifecycle over the encrypted peer link.
